element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players establish directional movement and positioning early
Standard shot type, baseline offensive capability
Destroyable enemies drop weapon upgrades and items
Unique defensive/offensive tool for holding enemies as shields or launching against others
Alternative weapon type requiring active switching
Third weapon variant with tracking behavior
Progressive power increase mechanic tied to weapon choice
Affects dodge capability and positioning flexibility
Emergency clear weapon; also triggered by taking hits
Required combat gates; increase in complexity each loop

typical_tension_triggers: Firepower penalty on hit (returns to baseline)
Speed penalty on collision (returns to baseline)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Constant horizontal scroll maintains steady forward momentum; tension builds through stage toward boss encounter; each stage completion followed by harder loop with denser bullets and extra spawned projectiles

difficulty_curve.early_game: Stages 1-3: Introduction of core mechanics (Seizer Beam, weapon switching, basic enemy patterns)
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stages 4-6: Increased enemy density and more complex boss patterns; players must master weapon selection and shield mechanics
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stages 7-8: Maximum difficulty approaching boss; after loop completion, all eight stages repeat with denser bullet patterns and extra projectile spawns
notable_spikes: Each stage boss encounter (mandatory difficulty spike)
Loop restart after stage 8 (difficulty resets then escalates beyond original)
Enemy fire density increases significantly on subsequent loops

notable_level_patterns.description: Horizontal scrolling progression from start to boss arena; constant background scroll until boss encounter; enemies spawn in waves between checkpoints
Each of eight stages ends with a mandatory boss fight blocking advancement; defeating boss required before moving to next stage
After completing stage 8, game loops back to stage 1 but with increased difficulty: denser enemy fire patterns and extra bullets spawned when enemies destroyed
